debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
label : α
l : LabelledTree α
h : IsOrdered α inst✝ l
⊢ fastCheckMem α inst✝ label l = true ↔ label ∈ l

failed_attempts:
induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    <;> aesop
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem] at *
    cases' lt_trichotomy label v with hlt heq
    · subst_vars
      simp_all
    · cases' hlt with hlt hgt
      · rw [if_pos (by simp [hlt])]
        have := h.1
        have := h.2.1
        have := h.2.2.1
        have := h.2.2.2.1
        have := h.2.2.2.2
        simp_all
        <;> aesop
      · rw [if_neg (by simp [hlt]), if_neg (by simp [hgt])]
        have := h.1
        have := h.2.1
        have := h.2.2.1
        have := h.2.2.2.1
        have := h.2.2.2.2
        simp_all
        <;> aesop

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    <;> constructor <;> intro <;> simp_all
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]

    split
    · intro h_fast
      cases' lt_trichotomy label v with h_lt h_eq
      · rw [h_lt] at h_fast
        specialize ihl hl hl_ord
        simp_all
      · cases' h_eq with h_eq h_gt
        · subst h_eq
          exact Or.inl hv
        · rw [h_gt] at h_fast
          specialize ihr hr hr_ord
          simp_all
    · intro h_mem
      cases' h_mem with h_mem_left h_mem_right
      · cases' lt_trichotomy label v with h_lt h_eq
        · specialize ihl hl hl_ord
          simp_all
        · cases' h_eq with h_eq h_gt
          · subst h_eq
            simp_all
          · exfalso
            have h_le := hl label h_mem_left
            linarith
      · cases' lt_trichotomy label v with h_lt h_eq
        · exfalso
          have h_ge := hr label h_mem_right
          linarith
        · cases' h_eq with h_eq h_gt
          · subst h_eq
            simp_all
          · specialize ihr hr hr_ord
            simp_all

  | leaf x =>

    <;> aesop
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] at h ⊢

      · cases' h_eq_v with h_eq_v h_gt
        · subst h_eq_v
          cases' h5 with h5_left h5_right
          · exact Or.inl h5_left
          · exact Or.inr h5_right
        · rw [h_eq] at h_gt
          apply Or.inr
          exact ihr.1 (by simp [h_gt])
    · intro h_mem
      cases' h_mem with h_mem_l h_mem_r
      · cases' lt_trichotomy label v with h_lt h_eq_v
        · rw [h_lt]
          exact ihl.2 h_mem_l
        · cases' h_eq_v with h_eq_v h_gt
          · subst h_eq_v
            simp
          · exfalso
            have h_le := h1 label h_mem_l
            linarith
      · cases' lt_trichotomy label v with h_lt h_eq_v
        · exfalso
          have h_ge := h2 label h_mem_r
          linarith
        · cases' h_eq_v with h_eq_v h_gt
          · subst h_eq_v
            simp
          · rw [h_gt]
            exact ihr.2 h_mem_r

induction l with

    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    <;> aesop

    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] at h ⊢

      by_cases h_eq : label = v
      · subst h_eq
        exact Or.inl (Or.inr hv)
      · by_cases h_lt : label < v
        · have : fastCheckMem label l = true := h_fast
          rw [ihl hl_ord] at this
          exact Or.inl this
        · have : fastCheckMem label r = true := h_fast
          rw [ihr hr_ord] at this
          exact Or.inr this
    · intro h_mem
      cases h_mem with
      | inl h_mem_l =>
        by_cases h_eq : label = v
        · subst h_eq

          by_cases h_lt : label < v
          · simp [fastCheckMem, h_eq, h_lt]
            rw [ihl hl_ord]
            exact h_mem_l
          · have : label = v := le_antisymm (not_lt.mp h_lt ▸ this) (le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_ne this h_eq))
            contradiction
      | inr h_mem_r =>
        by_cases h_eq : label = v
        · subst h_eq
          simp [fastCheckMem]
        · have : v ≤ label := hr _ h_mem_r
          by_cases h_lt : label < v
          · have : v ≤ label ∧ label < v := ⟨this, h_lt⟩
            exact lt_irrefl v (lt_of_le_of_lt this h_lt)
          · simp [fastCheckMem, h_eq, h_lt]
            rw [ihr hr_ord]
            exact h_mem_r

            have : label ∈ l := hmeml
            have : label ≤ v := this _ hmeml

        rw [this] at hmem
        specialize ihr hordr''
        simp_all
    · intro hmem
      cases' lt_trichotomy label v with hlt heq
      · rw [hlt]
        specialize ihl hordl'
        simp_all
      · rw [heq]
        simp_all
      · have : v < label := by

          · exfalso

            have : label ∈ l := hmeml

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    <;> aesop
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] at h ⊢
    rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hl_ord, hr_ord, hv⟩
    split
    · intro h_fast
      cases le_or_lt label v with
      | inl h_le =>
        if h_eq : label = v then
          subst h_eq
          aesop
        else
          have h_lt : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne h_le h_eq
          specialize ihl hl hl_ord
          simp_all
      | inr h_gt =>
        specialize ihr hr hr_ord
        simp_all
    · intro h_mem
      cases h_mem with
      | inl h_mem_l =>
        cases le_or_lt label v with
        | inl h_le =>
          if h_eq : label = v then
            subst h_eq
            simp_all
          else
            have h_lt : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne h_le h_eq
            specialize ihl hl hl_ord
            simp_all
        | inr h_gt =>
          exfalso
          exact (not_le_of_gt h_gt) (hl _ h_mem_l)
      | inr h_mem_r =>
        cases le_or_lt label v with
        | inl h_le =>
          exfalso
          exact (not_le_of_gt (hr _ h_mem_r)) h_le
        | inr h_gt =>
          specialize ihr hr hr_ord
          simp_all

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    <;> aesop
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] at h ⊢

    by_cases h_eq : label = v <;> simp [h_eq]
    · aesop
    by_cases h_lt : label < v <;> simp [h_lt]
    · have : label ≤ v := le_of_lt h_lt
      have : ∀ x ∈ l, x ≤ v := hl
      have : IsOrdered l := hl_ord
      specialize ihl this
      aesop
    · have : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt h_lt
      have : ∀ x ∈ r, v ≤ x := hr
      have : IsOrdered r := hr_ord
      specialize ihr this
      aesop

induction l with

    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hl_ord, hr_ord, hv⟩
    by_cases h_eq : label = v <;> simp [h_eq]
    <;> by_cases h_lt : label < v <;> simp [h_lt]
    <;> aesop

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    <;> constructor <;> intro <;> simp_all
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hl_ord, hr_ord, hv⟩
    by_cases h_eq : label = v <;> simp_all
    <;> by_cases h_lt : label < v <;> simp_all [le_of_lt]
    <;> constructor
      <;> intro h_mem
      <;> cases h_mem <;> simp_all

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    <;> aesop
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hl_ord, hr_ord, hv_mem⟩
    split
    · intro h_fast
      cases' lt_trichotomy label v with h_lt h_eq
      · subst_vars
        exact Or.inl (ihl hl hl_ord h_fast)
      · cases' h_eq with h_eq h_gt
        · subst_vars
          exact hv_mem
        · subst_vars
          exact Or.inr (ihr hr hr_ord h_fast)
    · intro h_mem
      cases' h_mem with h_left h_right
      · cases' lt_trichotomy label v with h_lt h_eq
        · subst_vars
          exact ihl hl hl_ord h_left
        · cases' h_eq with h_eq h_gt
          · subst_vars
            simp_all
          · exfalso
            have h_not_ge : ¬(v ≤ label) := by
              intro h_v_le
              exact h_gt (le_of_lt h_lt)
            exact h_not_ge (hl label h_left)
      · cases' lt_trichotomy label v with h_lt h_eq
        · exfalso
          have h_not_le : ¬(label ≤ v) := by
            intro h_label_le
            exact h_lt (lt_of_le_of_ne h_label_le (Ne.symm (fun h => h_gt (le_of_eq h))))
          exact h_not_le (hr label h_right)
        · cases' h_eq with h_eq h_gt
          · subst_vars
            simp_all
          · subst_vars
            exact ihr hr hr_ord h_right

induction l with
  | leaf x => simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] at h ⊢
    have h1 := h.1
    have h2 := h.2.1
    have h3 := h.2.2.1
    have h4 := h.2.2.2.1
    have h5 := h.2.2.2.2
    split
    · intro hf
      cases' lt_trichotomy label v with hlt heq
      · rw [if_pos (by simp [hlt])] at hf
        rw [or_iff_not_imp_left]
        intro hnl
        exact ihl.1 hf hnl
      · rw [if_neg (by simp [heq]), if_neg (by simp [heq.ge])] at hf
        simp_all
      · rw [if_neg (by simp [heq.le]), if_pos (by simp [hlt.not_le])] at hf
        exact ihr.1 hf
    · intro hm
      cases' hm with hml hmr
      · cases' lt_trichotomy label v with hlt heq
        · rw [if_pos (by simp [hlt])]
          exact ihl.2 hml
        · rw [if_neg (by simp [heq]), if_neg (by simp [heq.ge])]
          simp_all
        · exfalso
          have hv := h1 label hml
          linarith
      · cases' lt_trichotomy label v with hlt heq
        · exfalso
          have hv := h2 label hmr
          linarith
        · rw [if_neg (by simp [heq]), if_neg (by simp [heq.ge])]
          simp_all
        · rw [if_neg (by simp [heq.le]), if_pos (by simp [hlt.not_le])]
          exact ihr.2 hmr

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    <;> aesop
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] at h ⊢
    rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hordl, hordr, hv⟩
    by_cases hlabel : label = v <;> simp [hlabel]
    <;> by_cases hlt : label < v <;> simp [hlt]
    <;> by_cases hgt : v < label <;> simp [hgt]
    <;> try { aesop }
    <;> try { exact ihl hordl }
    <;> try { exact ihr hordr }

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    <;> aesop
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] at h ⊢
    rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hl_ord, hr_ord, hv⟩
    split
    · intro h_fast
      cases le_or_lt label v with
      | inl h_le =>
        if h_eq : label = v then
          simp_all
        else
          have : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne h_le h_eq
          simp_all
          exact Or.inl (ihl hl hl_ord this)
      | inr h_lt =>
        simp_all
        exact Or.inr (ihr hr hr_ord h_lt)
    · intro h_mem
      cases h_mem with
      | inl h_mem_l =>
        cases le_or_lt label v with
        | inl h_le =>
          if h_eq : label = v then
            simp_all
          else
            have : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne h_le h_eq
            simp_all
            exact ihl.1 h_mem_l
        | inr h_lt =>
          exfalso
          have : ∀ x ∈ l, x ≤ v := hl
          have : label ≤ v := this _ h_mem_l
          exact h_lt.not_le this
      | inr h_mem_r =>
        cases le_or_lt label v with
        | inl h_le =>
          exfalso
          have : ∀ x ∈ r, v ≤ x := hr
          have : v ≤ label := this _ h_mem_r
          exact h_le.not_lt (lt_of_le_of_ne this (Ne.symm (Ne.symm ‹_›)))
        | inr h_lt =>
          simp_all
          exact ihr.1 h_mem_r

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    <;> aesop
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] at h ⊢
    have h₁ : ∀ x ∈ l, x ≤ v := h.1
    have h₂ : ∀ x ∈ r, v ≤ x := h.2.1
    have h₃ : IsOrdered l := h.2.2.1
    have h₄ : IsOrdered r := h.2.2.2.1
    have h₅ : v ∈ l ∨ v ∈ r := h.2.2.2.2
    split
    · intro h_eq
      cases' lt_trichotomy label v with h_lt h_eq_v
      · rw [h_eq] at h_eq
        exact Or.inl (ihl h₃ h_eq)
      · cases' h_eq_v with h_eq_v h_gt
        · subst h_eq_v
          exact Or.inl (by aesop)
        · rw [h_eq] at h_eq
          exact Or.inr (ihr h₄ h_eq)
    · intro h_mem
      cases' h_mem with h_mem_l h_mem_r
      · cases' lt_trichotomy label v with h_lt h_eq_v
        · rw [h_eq_v] at h_mem_l
          exact ihl h₃ h_mem_l
        · cases' h_eq_v with h_eq_v h_gt
          · subst h_eq_v
            simp
          · exfalso
            specialize h₁ label h_mem_l
            linarith
      · cases' lt_trichotomy label v with h_lt h_eq_v
        · exfalso
          specialize h₂ label h_mem_r
          linarith
        · cases' h_eq_v with h_eq_v h_gt
          · subst h_eq_v
            simp
          · rw [h_eq_v]
            exact ihr h₄ h_mem_r

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    <;> constructor <;> intro <;> simp_all
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hl_ord, hr_ord, hv⟩
    by_cases h_eq : label = v <;> simp_all
    <;> by_cases h_lt : label < v <;> simp_all [le_of_lt]
    <;> constructor
    · intro h_mem
      cases' h_mem with h_mem_left h_mem_right
      · left
        exact ihl hl_ord h_mem_left
      · right
        exact ihr hr_ord h_mem_right
    · intro h_mem
      cases' h_mem with h_mem_left h_mem_right
      · left
        exact ihl.1 hl_ord h_mem_left
      · right
        exact ihr.1 hr_ord h_mem_right

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    <;> aesop
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] at h ⊢
    rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hl_ord, hr_ord, hv_mem⟩
    by_cases h_eq : label = v <;> simp [h_eq]
    <;> by_cases h_lt : label < v <;> simp [h_lt]
    <;> aesop
